'''kafate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nearby|nearby]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nearby|nearby]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| kafate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:kafate|kafate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafatesher|kafatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafatesherĂ«m|kafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafatero|kafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafateshĂ«|kafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafateshĂ«m|kafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafatero|gokikafatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafateshĂ«|gokikafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafateshĂ«m|gokikafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafankerom|gokafankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafankeshĂ«|gokafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafankeshĂ«m|gokafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafankeya|gokafankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafaterom|kafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafatemu|kafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafateya|kafateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafaterom|gokikafaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafatemu|gokikafatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafateya|gokikafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafafate|kafafate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafafatesher|kafafatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafafatesherĂ«m|kafafatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafafatero|kafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafafateshĂ«|kafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafafateshĂ«m|kafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafafatero|gokikafafatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafafateshĂ«|gokikafafateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafafateshĂ«m|gokikafafateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafafankerom|gokafafankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafafankeshĂ«|gokafafankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafafankeshĂ«m|gokafafankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafafankeya|gokafafankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafafaterom|kafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafafatemu|kafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafafateya|kafafateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafafaterom|gokikafafaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafafatemu|gokikafafatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafafateya|gokikafafateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠte|kĂŠfĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠtesher|kĂŠfĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m|kĂŠfĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠtero|kĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|kĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|kĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠtero|gokikĂŠfĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«|gokikĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m|gokikĂŠfĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokĂŠfĂŠnkerom|gokĂŠfĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«|gokĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gokĂŠfĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokĂŠfĂŠnkeya|gokĂŠfĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠterom|kĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠtemu|kĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kĂŠfĂŠteya|kĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠterom|gokikĂŠfĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠtemu|gokikĂŠfĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikĂŠfĂŠteya|gokikĂŠfĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:kafafte|kafafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:kafaftesher|kafaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafaftesherĂ«m|kafaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafaftero|kafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:kafafteshĂ«|kafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafafteshĂ«m|kafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafaftero|gokikafaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokikafafteshĂ«|gokikafafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafafteshĂ«m|gokikafafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokafafnkerom|gokafafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokafafnkeshĂ«|gokafafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokafafnkeshĂ«m|gokafafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokafafnkeya|gokafafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:kafafterom|kafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:kafaftemu|kafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:kafafteya|kafafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokikafafterom|gokikafafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokikafaftemu|gokikafaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokikafafteya|gokikafafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
